name: Jellygram
overview: Grouped Telegram notifications for new Jellyfin media
description: Sends rich Telegram notifications when movies and TV are added to Jellyfin. Full shows, seasons, and episode imports are grouped to avoid notification spam.

versions.changelog: New-show digests now identify imported season numbers and compact multi-season ranges. The Jellyfin plugin page also uses a properly padded 16:9 image.
Initial release with movie and TV notifications, hierarchical batching, metadata readiness retries, descriptions, posters, forum topics, and silent delivery.
